meaning: adj.[生化]肾上腺素的,释放肾上腺素的
examples: The effect of adenosine is blocked by adrenergic receptor blockers.
Beta adrenergic drugs are advised on the account of severe attacks of asthma.
Adrenergic system plays an important role in regulating cardiovascular system.
Over-the-counter nasal decongestants act by stimulating receptors in nasal passages called alpha-1 adrenergic receptors.
